scripts.build: node scripts/sync-family-static.mjs && node scripts/sync-mobile-races.mjs --check && node scripts/validate-static.mjs
scripts.test: node scripts/verify-family.mjs generated/robom-family family.lock.json && node scripts/sync-family-static.mjs --check && node scripts/sync-mobile-races.mjs --check && node scripts/validate-static.mjs && node --test "scripts/*.test.mjs"
